mission.title: weaviate: FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator
mission.description: FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator. Requested by 34+ users.

steps.title: Check current weaviate deployment
steps.description:
Verify your weaviate version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
helm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working weaviate installation.

steps.title: Review weaviate configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate
```
Building on the work of #2387 and #3319 we can now support a `ContainsNone` array operator.

steps.title: Apply the fix for FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator
steps.description:
### What's being changed:

Added a ContainsNone operator which is internally implemented by `AND`s of multiple `NotEquals` Operations.

### Review checklist
```yaml
{
  title: "Braveheart",
  director: "Mel Gibson",
  languages: ["English", "French", "Latin", "Scottish Gaelic"],
  ...
},{
  title: "A Prophet",
  director: "Mel Gibson",
  languages: ["French", "Arabic", "Corsican"],
  ...
},
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate
kubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "FR: Add a `ContainsNone` operator" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### What's being changed:

Added a ContainsNone operator which is internally implemented by `AND`s of multiple `NotEquals` Operations.

### Review checklist

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with weaviate installed or the issue environment reproducible.
